implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: UI form for adding a new task, collects title, description, priority, due date, and passes data to the parent via onSubmit.
implementation.name: TaskForm
implementation.pseudo_code:
Render a form with fields:
  - Title (required)
  - Description
  - Priority (Low/Medium/High)
  - Due Date
On submit:
  - Validate required fields
  - Call onSubmit with task data

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Handles the submission from TaskForm, invokes API to create a new task, reloads task list.
implementation.name: handleCreateTask
implementation.pseudo_code:
When TaskForm submits:
  - Call api.createTask with task data
  - Reload tasks from backend
  - Close the form

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Sends a POST request to backend /tasks endpoint with task data (title, description, priority, due date, completed).
implementation.name: api.createTask
implementation.pseudo_code:
Send POST request to /tasks with task data
If response is OK:
  - Return created task
Else:
  - Throw error

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: FastAPI endpoint for POST /tasks, receives task data, calls database.add_task.
implementation.name: create_task
implementation.pseudo_code:
On POST /tasks:
  - Receive TaskCreate data
  - Call database.add_task with data
  - Return created Task

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Creates a new Task object with provided fields, assigns unique ID, saves to storage.
implementation.name: add_task
implementation.pseudo_code:
Get current tasks
Create new Task with unique ID and provided fields
Append to task list
Save updated list
Return new Task

missing_implementations: User name field is not present in TaskForm, TaskCreate, API, backend endpoint, or database logic. There is no implementation for associating a user name with a task.
